big_picture: At A$1.13 – up 31.9% on the session and near the 52-week high of A$1.67 – OBM is priced as a credible but unfunded gold developer at an early but accelerating stage of a resource re-rating cycle. The market has rapidly absorbed the tenfold Round Dam resource upgrade, the Little Gem and Sapphire Tren
